# Proposal Spots

> A curated directory of the world's most romantic proposal locations, with destination guides, planning articles, budget breakdowns, and a step-by-step checklist.

Proposal Spots helps couples plan memorable marriage proposals. Browse hundreds of hand-picked outdoor spots, restaurant tables, and private settings across popular destinations — each with photos and context. Alongside the directory, the site publishes practical planning guides covering budget, timing, photographer hiring, and proposal formats.

## Main Pages

- __[Home](https://www.proposalspots.com/)__: Full directory of proposal spots, filterable by destination, setting, and budget
- __[Destinations](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations)__: Overview of all destination guides
- __[Proposal Checklist](https://www.proposalspots.com/checklist)__: Step-by-step proposal planning checklist
- __[Budget Guide](https://www.proposalspots.com/budget-guide)__: How much a proposal costs and where to spend wisely
- __[How It Works](https://www.proposalspots.com/how-it-works)__: How the directory and planning tools work
- __[Inspiration](https://www.proposalspots.com/inspiration)__: Planning articles and real proposal stories

## Destination Guides

- __[Greece](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/greece)__: Best proposal spots in Greece and Santorini
- __[Italy](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/italy)__: Best proposal spots in Italy
- __[Amalfi Coast](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/amalfi-coast)__: Best proposal spots on the Amalfi Coast
- __[South of France](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/south-of-france)__: Best proposal spots in the South of France
- __[Portugal](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/portugal)__: Best proposal spots in Portugal
- __[Switzerland](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/switzerland)__: Best proposal spots in Switzerland
- __[Maldives](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/maldives)__: Best proposal spots in the Maldives
- __[Bali](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/bali)__: Best proposal spots in Bali
- __[Tulum](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/tulum)__: Best proposal spots in Tulum, Mexico
- __[Costa Rica](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/costa-rica)__: Best proposal spots in Costa Rica
- __[Nicaragua](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/nicaragua)__: Best proposal spots in Nicaragua
- __[Hawaii](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/hawaii)__: Best proposal spots in Hawaii
- __[United States](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/united-states)__: Best proposal spots across the United States

## Planning Guides

- __[How to Plan a Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/how-to-plan-a-proposal)__: Complete step-by-step planning guide
- __[Romantic Proposal Ideas](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/romantic-proposal-ideas)__: Ideas by setting, relationship style, and budget
- __[Best Destinations to Propose](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/best-destinations-to-propose)__: Top destinations worldwide ranked by setting and season
- __[Proposal Packages](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-packages)__: What proposal packages include and what they cost
- __[Proposal Set-Up](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-set-up)__: How to set up a proposal scene
- __[Picnic Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/picnic-proposal)__: How to plan a picnic proposal
- __[Beach Proposal Packages](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/beach-proposal-packages)__: Guide to beach proposal packages
- __[Beach Wedding Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/beach-wedding-proposal)__: How to plan a beach proposal
- __[Romantic Dinner Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/romantic-dinner-proposal)__: How to propose at a restaurant
- __[Destination Engagement Photographer](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/destination-engagement-photographer)__: How to find and hire one
- __[Proposal Planner](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-planner)__: When a proposal planner is worth hiring, what they cost, and what to ask before signing
